app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.69 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for offline clone detection and a fixed minified startup.
releaseNotes: Cascade no longer appears inside the native ExoPlayer server list
Cascade is disabled by remote config and permanently disabled on TV
Added Probe remaining servers to the server menu
Sports and Anime tabs are disabled unless remote config explicitly enables them
Official builds verify package and signing certificate locally, even offline
Gateway config remains the remote source for updates and feature switches when online
R8 keep rules were tightened for Firebase/Gson profile models
Home banner and poster cards have been polished
Release builds now run R8 minification and resource shrinking

items.title: The Cube 2.0.69
items.message: Offline clone detection and fixed R8 startup for the minified release.

items.title: WE ARE BACK
items.message: Development and fixes are actively ongoing. We’re continuing to improve playback, streaming stability, performance, and the issues you’ve reported. You can still enjoy THE CUBE while we work—updates and improvements will continue rolling out regularly. Thank you for your patience and support. ❤️

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
